summary: Weapon GLB lifecycle ownership is implemented, but automated reset-loop memory QA is still pending.
observations: WeaponSystem.dispose() removes input listeners, closes WeaponAudio, and disposes weapon geometries/materials/textures.
Detached loaded weapons are disposed even when they are not currently attached to the viewmodel slot.
Debug memory metrics expose weaponModelBytesLoaded for the current weapon set.
decisions: Keep weapon model ownership scoped to WeaponSystem.
Five reset loops should return texture and geometry counts to baseline before larger asset imports.
Shared resources can stay simple for this tiny weapon set but need review before cross-system sharing.
caughtIssues: A scene-graph-only dispose path could miss loaded weapon models that were detached by weapon switching.
risks: No automated reset-loop memory test exists yet.
Future shared textures or model caches may need reference counting.
